home_page.title: The 3D Game Engine for the AI Era
home_page.community_carousel.heading: Made by our Community
home_page.community_carousel.subheading: Discover how creators are turning ideas into playable worlds.
home_page.create_for_free_cta.heading: Alright, that’s enough reading!
home_page.create_for_free_cta.subheading: Hit Start Building and see what this thing can really do.
home_page.discovery_section.heading: Powered by 8th Wall
home_page.discovery_section.subheading: From 3D games to AR experiences, check out what developers are creating with 8th Wall.
home_page.engine_section.description.bui: Stop waiting to see your ideas come to life. 8th Wall is a real-time visual editor where you can drag, drop, and edit scenes instantly. Work visually or jump into code whenever you want, everything updates live.
home_page.engine_section.description.rea: Build together with instant updates across your team
home_page.engine_section.description.vis: Drag and drop or dive into scripts
home_page.engine_section.description.bui: Available for both desktop and web
home_page.engine_section.description.edi: Build, edit, and preview 3D scenes in real time
home_page.engine_section.description.pow: Under the hood, Studio runs on a complete cross-platform engine for 3D and XR. Real-time physics, lighting, and scripting work together on a familiar ECS foundation. Add interaction and animation right inside the editor and see your world come alive instantly.
home_page.engine_section.description.eig: generates clean code and scenes from natural prompts, giving you a head start on logic and interactivity.
home_page.engine_section.description.ass: creates production-ready 3D models, textures, and animations in seconds — no placeholders required.
home_page.engine_section.description.acc: 8th Wall builds AI directly into your workflow, combining speed, flexibility, and control so you can focus on creating, not setup.
home_page.engine_section.description.bri: Connect your creations to the real world with AR tools built directly into the 8th Wall engine. No SDKs, plugins, or installs required.
home_page.engine_section.description.wor: Anchor 3D content to physical spaces using world tracking for realistic scale and motion.
home_page.engine_section.description.ima: Launch interactive scenes from logos, packaging, or posters on flat or curved surfaces.
home_page.engine_section.description.fac: Add expressive interactions and filters that track faces and
home_page.engine_section.description.loc: ties content to real-world places using VPS, splats, or base maps making it easy to build persistent, place-based experiences.
home_page.engine_section.heading.build_v: Build visually and edit in real time
home_page.engine_section.heading.power_y: Power your build with a full 3D engine
home_page.engine_section.heading.acceler: Accelerate development with AI in the loop
home_page.featured_category.avatars_holo: Watch celebrities perform as holograms in your home or create your own avatar to explore the world around you in AR.
home_page.featured_category.featured.des: Our Editor's pick of web-based augmented reality applications you can experience directly in your browser—no app required.
home_page.featured_category.games.name: Games
home_page.featured_category.games.descri: Challenge yourself to a game in another dimension or invite others to engage in immersive play with these WebAR games.
home_page.featured_category.niantic_stud: A diverse collection of content built with the the all-new Niantic Studio.
Made with all new visual editor Niantic Studio
home_page.featured_category.portals.name: Portals
home_page.featured_category.portals.desc: Open the door to another world and experience something extraordinary with these WebAR portals powered by 8th Wall.
home_page.featured_category.virtual_try_: Try on accessories using the front-facing camera on your smartphone or flip it around to try-out products in your own room.
home_page.featured_category.vps.name: VPS
home_page.featured_category.vps.descript: Explore experiences precisely tied to the real-world using our Visual Positioning System (VPS).
home_page.hero.subheading_old: Build with Niantic Studio for WebXR, 3D experiences and web games—no app required.
home_page.hero.heading: The 3D Game Engine for the AI Era
home_page.hero.subheading: Web Native. AI Powered. Deploy Anywhere.
home_page.hero_banner.heading: <1>The</1><2/> Game Engine for the AI Era
home_page.hero_banner.subheading: Built for developers who can’t wait. Create, test, and ship faster with AI in the loop.
home_page.metrics_section.description.ye: A decade powering 3D and AR projects across thousands of launches.
home_page.metrics_section.description.pl: Hundreds of millions of real players reached worldwide.
home_page.metrics_section.description.pr: The fastest path from setup to testing an idea in 3D.
home_page.metrics_section.heading.build_: Built for real projects, not just demos.
home_page.reach_banner.heading: Reach players anywhere, <1/>on any platform
home_page.reach_banner.subheading: Deploy instantly to the web for frictionless play or export as a native app without rebuilding. Publish to iOS, Android, and browser from a single project.
home_page.service_section.description.pr: Drag-and-drop tools, GenAI asset creation and live testing.
home_page.service_section.description.bu: Best-in-class game engine and computer vision stack.
home_page.service_section.description.de: Browser or native app for mobile, desktop or headset.
home_page.social_proof_banner.heading: Scale ideas into global launches
home_page.social_proof_banner.descriptio: 8th Wall powers immersive campaigns and 3D projects for some of the world’s most recognized brands. From fast connecting to global rollouts, we help enterprises deliver at scale.
home_page.social_proof_section.heading: Join the world's most innovative companies <1 /> using 8th Wall WebAR
module_library_page.title: Clone WebAR, AR, WebVR Sample Modules
partners_page.description.connect_with_p: Looking to use the 8th Wall platform for your next big project? 8th Wall Partners are a network of verified WebAR production and creative studios that can bring your next project to life. Click on a Partner to see their portfolio of work and contact them to get started.
partners_page.description.about_partners: 8th Wall Partners are a global network of trusted agencies, production studios and creative development studios that have proven experience using the 8th Wall platform. These Partners help brands succeed with WebAR and WebVR by working with them at every stage of the process from ideation and design to development and launch.
project_library_page.title: Clone WebAR, AR, WebVR Sample Projects

project_library_page.tooltip.editor_badg: Cloud Editor only. This project requires the Cloud Editor.
project_module_library_header.blurb: Click to clone any of these ready-to-use WebAR or 3D sample projects and modules into your workspace. Made by 8th Wall and the creator community.
